case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. LETICIA ALCAZAR

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$110.00) SERVED FEB-08-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALCAZAR, LETICIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2023 - JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALCAZAR, LETICIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALCAZAR, LETICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALCAZAR, LETICIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALCAZAR, LETICIA $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,110.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE HUSING. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVE ADELSON, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT LETICIA ALCAZAR IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $79.78 ACCRUED INTEREST, $45.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ALCAZAR, LETICIA
